disambiguation_rules.agency head: Refers generically to heads of Federal agencies whose missions relate to advanced air mobility and unmanned aircraft systems; resolved from context in section (3)(J) and (4)-(5)
disambiguation_rules.agency head references: Section (c) uses 'heads of other Federal departments and agencies' in context of interagency coordination to avoid duplication; this is a generic role reference, not a specific entity.

oddities.note: Document provided is only a title header without substantive legislative text. Full section content needed for complete entity extraction.

Document provided contains only a section header and summary text without substantive legislative content. Full text of Title VI required for complete entity extraction of research initiatives, eligible entities, funding mechanisms, and interagency coordination structures referenced in summary.

Document provided contains only a section header and summary text without substantive legislative content. Full text of Title VII required for complete entity extraction of research initiatives, eligible entities, funding mechanisms, Counter-UAS Center structure, cybersecurity requirements, data management specifications, and interagency coordination mechanisms referenced in summary.

llm_disambiguation_log.resolved: Refers generically to heads of Federal agencies whose missions relate to advanced air mobility and unmanned aircraft systems; resolved from context in section (3)(J) and (4)-(5)
Section (c) uses 'heads of other Federal departments and agencies' in context of interagency coordination to avoid duplication; this is a generic role reference, not a specific entity.
